summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 1 Konekt B2B features: Service Task backend CRUD, Partner Assigned Work page, and Global Confirmation Modal enforcement. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified Partner Assigned Work page with KPI row, task table, detail drawer, cost submission, status updates with confirmation modal. Admin confirmation modals verified on Products (delete) and Users (deactivate) pages.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed service tasks for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Task system fully tested. Partner login uses /api/partner-auth/login returning 'access_token' (not 'token'). Partner portal at /partner/*. Partner sees only cost layer (no margin/selling_price). Admin endpoints don't require auth. 4 seeded service tasks exist for demo partner.

backend_endpoints: POST /api/admin/service-tasks - creates task with correct fields, timeline entry
GET /api/admin/service-tasks/stats/summary - returns KPI aggregation (assigned, awaiting_cost, cost_submitted, in_progress, completed, delayed, failed, unassigned, total)
PUT /api/admin/service-tasks/{id}/assign - assigns partner to task, updates timeline
PUT /api/admin/service-tasks/{id}/status - admin status override with timeline
GET /api/partner-portal/assigned-work - returns partner's tasks (cost layer only, no margin/selling_price)
PUT /api/partner-portal/assigned-work/{id}/submit-cost - stores cost, triggers 30% margin calculation internally
frontend_features: Partner Assigned Work page (/partner/assigned-work) renders with KPI row (5 cards: Assigned, Awaiting Cost, In Progress, Completed, Delayed)
Task table displays tasks with columns: Task Ref, Service Type, Client, Deadline, Status, Actions
Task detail drawer opens on row click - shows task summary, cost input section, status actions, proof/attachment, notes, timeline
Cost input field works (data-testid='cost-input'), Submit Cost button calls API
Status update buttons use confirmation modal (e.g., 'Update Status to In Progress?')
Success toast shown after status update ('Status updated to in_progress')
KPI cards update after status change
Admin Products page - Delete triggers brand-styled confirmation modal ('Delete Product?')
Admin Users page - Deactivate triggers brand-styled confirmation modal ('Deactivate User?')
confirmation_modal_enforcement: AdminProducts.js - uses confirmAction for delete with tone='danger'
AdminUsers.js - uses confirmAction for deactivate with tone='danger'
PartnerAssignedWorkPage.jsx - uses confirmAction for status updates
